name: Smokebuddy Junior
summary: Has a compact design that effectively minimises second-hand smoke and unwanted odours.
description: Has a compact design that effectively minimises second-hand smoke and unwanted odours. With its advanced filtration system, it can eliminate smoke from your exhale, ensuring a fresher smoking experience. Portable and discreet, you can enjoy hassle-free smoking anywhere you go while keeping the air clean and those around you at ease. Item Dimensions: 2.50 x 1 x 3.5 inches Item Weight: 2.4 ounces Package Dimensions: 4.75 x 1.5 x 6.25 inches Shipping Weight: 3 ounces A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
